requirement_topic.en: EMC — SASO Adoption of CISPR / IEC Standards for Radiated and Conducted Emissions
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——SASO采用CISPR/IEC标准（辐射及传导骚扰）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——SASO採用CISPR/IEC標準（輻射及傳導騷擾）

summary.en: Saudi Arabia, through SASO (Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization), adopts international IEC and CISPR standards as Saudi Technical Regulations (STRs). For wireless and multimedia IoT devices, the applicable EMC standard is SASO IEC/CISPR 32 (Multimedia Equipment — Electromagnetic Disturbances — Requirements for emission), the Saudi adoption of CISPR 32. This covers radiated and conducted disturbance limits for multimedia and IT devices incorporating wireless modules. SASO EMC conformity assessment is part of the SALEEM mandatory conformity assessment program for covered product categories, which includes electronic and electrical equipment. A Conformity Certificate or Certificate of Conformity (CoC) issued through the SALEEM program is required before products may be cleared through Saudi customs. Testing must be performed by accredited laboratories. The SASO CoC and SALEEM conformity mark must appear on the product. EMC compliance under SASO adopts the equivalent CISPR limits and test methodologies aligned with IEC publications.
summary.zh: 沙特阿拉伯通过SASO（沙特标准、计量和质量组织）将国际IEC和CISPR标准采纳为沙特技术法规（STR）。对于无线和多媒体物联网设备，适用的电磁兼容标准为SASO IEC/CISPR 32（多媒体设备——电磁骚扰——骚扰发射要求），即CISPR 32的沙特版本，涵盖集成无线模块的多媒体和IT设备的辐射及传导骚扰限值。SASO电磁兼容合格评定是SALEEM强制合格评定计划的组成部分，适用于涵盖产品类别（包括电子和电气设备）。产品须在沙特海关清关前取得通过SALEEM计划颁发的符合性证书（CoC）。检测须由认可实验室执行。SASO符合性证书和SALEEM合格标志须标注于产品上。SASO框架下的电磁兼容合规采用与IEC出版物接轨的等效CISPR限值和测试方法。
summary.zht: 沙特阿拉伯通過SASO（沙特標準、計量和質量組織）將國際IEC和CISPR標準採納為沙特技術法規（STR）。對於無線和多媒體物聯網設備，適用的電磁相容標準為SASO IEC/CISPR 32（多媒體設備——電磁騷擾——騷擾發射要求），即CISPR 32的沙特版本，涵蓋集成無線模塊的多媒體和IT設備的輻射及傳導騷擾限值。SASO電磁相容合格評定是SALEEM強制合格評定計劃的組成部分，適用於涵蓋產品類別（包括電子和電氣設備）。產品須在沙特海關清關前取得通過SALEEM計劃頒發的符合性證書（CoC）。檢測須由認可實驗室執行。SASO符合性證書和SALEEM合格標誌須標注於產品上。SASO框架下的電磁相容合規採用與IEC出版物接軌的等效CISPR限值和測試方法。

standards_or_laws: SASO IEC/CISPR 32 — Multimedia equipment — Electromagnetic disturbances — Requirements for emission (Saudi adoption of CISPR 32)
SASO SALEEM Program — mandatory product conformity assessment scheme covering electronic and electrical equipment for import into Saudi Arabia

summary.en: China's mandatory EMC standard for information technology and multimedia equipment is GB/T 9254 (Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement), which aligns with CISPR 22 / CISPR 32 but with Chinese national limit adaptations. For IT equipment within CCC scope, EMC compliance to GB/T 9254 is part of the CCC certification process administered by CNCA. For multimedia equipment, GB/T 13837 (corresponding to CISPR 13) covers conducted and radiated disturbances from broadcast receivers and associated equipment. Chinese CNCA-administered CCC EMC compliance to GB/T 9254 or GB/T 13837 is not recognized by SASO and does not satisfy SASO/SALEEM EMC conformity requirements for Saudi Arabia.
summary.zh: 中国信息技术和多媒体设备的强制电磁兼容标准为GB/T 9254（信息技术设备无线电骚扰特性——限值和测量方法），与CISPR 22/CISPR 32接轨，但有中国国家限值调整。对于CCC范围内的IT设备，GB/T 9254电磁兼容合规是CNCA管理的CCC认证流程的组成部分。对于多媒体设备，GB/T 13837（对应CISPR 13）涵盖广播接收机及相关设备的传导和辐射骚扰。依据GB/T 9254或GB/T 13837的中国CNCA管理的CCC电磁兼容合规不被SASO承认，不满足沙特阿拉伯的SASO/SALEEM电磁兼容符合性要求。
summary.zht: 中國信息技術和多媒體設備的強制電磁相容標準為GB/T 9254（信息技術設備無線電騷擾特性——限值和測量方法），與CISPR 22/CISPR 32接軌，但有中國國家限值調整。對於CCC範圍內的IT設備，GB/T 9254電磁相容合規是CNCA管理的CCC認證流程的組成部分。對於多媒體設備，GB/T 13837（對應CISPR 13）涵蓋廣播接收機及相關設備的傳導和輻射騷擾。依據GB/T 9254或GB/T 13837的中國CNCA管理的CCC電磁相容合規不被SASO承認，不滿足沙特阿拉伯的SASO/SALEEM電磁相容符合性要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Information technology equipment, radio disturbance characteristics — limits and methods of measurement (CISPR 22/32 aligned, CCC mandatory scope)
GB/T 13837 — Sound and television broadcast receivers and associated equipment — radio disturbance characteristics (CISPR 13 aligned)

gap.en: Chinese CCC EMC certification to GB/T 9254 or GB/T 13837 is not accepted by SASO as equivalent to SASO IEC/CISPR 32 conformity. The product must be independently re-tested against SASO IEC/CISPR 32 by an accredited laboratory and a SALEEM CoC obtained before import. While the underlying CISPR limits are similar (CISPR 32 is harmonized internationally), the conformity assessment pathway, accreditation, and certificate are entirely separate from CCC. A CoC issued under SALEEM must reference the applicable SASO standard and be obtained prior to Saudi customs clearance.
gap.zh: 中国依据GB/T 9254或GB/T 13837取得的CCC电磁兼容认证不被SASO接受为SASO IEC/CISPR 32符合性的等同替代。产品须由认可实验室独立依据SASO IEC/CISPR 32重新进行检测，并在进口前取得SALEEM符合性证书（CoC）。尽管基础CISPR限值相近（CISPR 32已国际协调），但合格评定路径、认可体系和证书与CCC完全独立。通过SALEEM颁发的CoC须引用适用的SASO标准，并须在沙特海关清关前取得。
gap.zht: 中國依據GB/T 9254或GB/T 13837取得的CCC電磁相容認證不被SASO接受為SASO IEC/CISPR 32符合性的等同替代。產品須由認可實驗室獨立依據SASO IEC/CISPR 32重新進行檢測，並在進口前取得SALEEM符合性證書（CoC）。儘管基礎CISPR限值相近（CISPR 32已國際協調），但合格評定路徑、認可體系和證書與CCC完全獨立。通過SALEEM頒發的CoC須引用適用的SASO標準，並須在沙特海關清關前取得。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SASO EMC conformity under SALEEM program required; SASO CoC must be obtained before Saudi customs clearance for covered electronic and electrical product categories
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC EMC certification to GB/T 9254 required for IT equipment in CCC scope before sale in China

source.publisher: Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SASO IEC/CISPR 32 EMC conformity assessment, issued as a SALEEM Certificate of Conformity, is required before wireless/IoT devices may be imported into Saudi Arabia. Chinese CCC EMC certification under GB/T 9254 does not satisfy this requirement. The product must be independently tested by an accredited laboratory against the applicable SASO standard and a SALEEM CoC obtained prior to customs clearance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SASO IEC/CISPR 32电磁兼容合格评定（以SALEEM符合性证书形式签发）是无线/物联网设备进口至沙特阿拉伯前的要求。依据GB/T 9254的中国CCC电磁兼容认证不满足此要求。产品须由认可实验室独立依据适用的SASO标准进行检测，并在清关前取得SALEEM符合性证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SASO IEC/CISPR 32電磁相容合格評定（以SALEEM符合性證書形式簽發）是無線/物聯網設備進口至沙特阿拉伯前的要求。依據GB/T 9254的中國CCC電磁相容認證不滿足此要求。產品須由認可實驗室獨立依據適用的SASO標準進行檢測，並在清關前取得SALEEM符合性證書。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Immunity and SASO SALEEM Conformity Mark on Product
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容抗扰度及产品SASO SALEEM合格标志
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容抗擾度及產品SASO SALEEM合格標誌

summary.en: In addition to emissions compliance under SASO IEC/CISPR 32, wireless IoT devices sold in Saudi Arabia must demonstrate immunity to electromagnetic disturbances. The applicable immunity standard adopted by SASO is SASO IEC 61000-4 series (Electromagnetic compatibility — Testing and measurement techniques), aligned with IEC 61000-4-2 (ESD), IEC 61000-4-3 (radiated immunity), IEC 61000-4-4 (electrical fast transient), IEC 61000-4-5 (surge), IEC 61000-4-6 (conducted immunity), and IEC 61000-4-8 (power frequency magnetic field). SASO immunity requirements apply for IT and multimedia equipment with wireless radio. The SALEEM mandatory conformity program requires a full CoC covering both emissions and immunity testing, issued by an accredited conformity body. The SALEEM conformity mark must be affixed to the product. Products without a valid SALEEM CoC will be refused at Saudi customs and cannot be placed on the Saudi market.
summary.zh: 除依据SASO IEC/CISPR 32的骚扰发射合规外，在沙特阿拉伯销售的无线物联网设备还须证明对电磁骚扰的抗扰度。SASO采用的适用抗扰度标准为SASO IEC 61000-4系列（电磁兼容——测试和测量技术），与IEC 61000-4-2（静电放电）、IEC 61000-4-3（辐射抗扰度）、IEC 61000-4-4（电快速瞬变）、IEC 61000-4-5（浪涌）、IEC 61000-4-6（传导抗扰度）和IEC 61000-4-8（工频磁场）接轨。SASO抗扰度要求适用于集成无线电的IT和多媒体设备。SALEEM强制合格评定计划要求提供由认可合格评定机构签发的涵盖骚扰发射和抗扰度测试的完整符合性证书（CoC）。SALEEM合格标志须贴附于产品上。无有效SALEEM CoC的产品将在沙特海关被拒绝，不得在沙特市场销售。
summary.zht: 除依據SASO IEC/CISPR 32的騷擾發射合規外，在沙特阿拉伯銷售的無線物聯網設備還須證明對電磁騷擾的抗擾度。SASO採用的適用抗擾度標準為SASO IEC 61000-4系列（電磁相容——測試和測量技術），與IEC 61000-4-2（靜電放電）、IEC 61000-4-3（輻射抗擾度）、IEC 61000-4-4（電快速瞬變）、IEC 61000-4-5（浪湧）、IEC 61000-4-6（傳導抗擾度）和IEC 61000-4-8（工頻磁場）接軌。SASO抗擾度要求適用於集成無線電的IT和多媒體設備。SALEEM強制合格評定計劃要求提供由認可合格評定機構簽發的涵蓋騷擾發射和抗擾度測試的完整符合性證書（CoC）。SALEEM合格標誌須貼附於產品上。無有效SALEEM CoC的產品將在沙特海關被拒絕，不得在沙特市場銷售。

standards_or_laws: SASO IEC 61000-4-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Testing and measurement techniques — ESD immunity test (Saudi adoption of IEC 61000-4-2)
SASO IEC 61000-4-3 — Radiated, radio-frequency, electromagnetic field immunity test (Saudi adoption of IEC 61000-4-3)
SASO SALEEM Program — mandatory conformity assessment and mark requirement for electronic and electrical equipment imported into Saudi Arabia

summary.en: In China, electromagnetic immunity for IT and multimedia equipment is addressed through GB/T 17626 series (Electromagnetic compatibility — Testing and measurement techniques), the Chinese national adoption of the IEC 61000-4 series. For CCC-certified products, immunity testing to the GB/T 17626 series is typically included as part of the CCC assessment process. For products outside formal CCC scope, voluntary compliance to GB/T 17626 may be demonstrated. Chinese CCC immunity testing to GB/T 17626 is not accepted by SASO as equivalent to conformity with SASO IEC 61000-4 series, and a SALEEM CoC covering immunity must be obtained separately for the Saudi market.
summary.zh: 在中国，IT和多媒体设备的电磁抗扰度通过GB/T 17626系列（电磁兼容——测试和测量技术）进行规范，该系列是IEC 61000-4系列的中国国家标准版本。对于CCC认证产品，依据GB/T 17626系列的抗扰度测试通常作为CCC评定流程的组成部分。对于CCC正式范围以外的产品，可自愿证明符合GB/T 17626。依据GB/T 17626的中国CCC抗扰度测试不被SASO接受为符合SASO IEC 61000-4系列的等同替代，须单独为沙特市场取得涵盖抗扰度的SALEEM符合性证书。
summary.zht: 在中國，IT和多媒體設備的電磁抗擾度通過GB/T 17626系列（電磁相容——測試和測量技術）進行規範，該系列是IEC 61000-4系列的中國國家標準版本。對於CCC認證產品，依據GB/T 17626系列的抗擾度測試通常作為CCC評定流程的組成部分。對於CCC正式範圍以外的產品，可自願證明符合GB/T 17626。依據GB/T 17626的中國CCC抗擾度測試不被SASO接受為符合SASO IEC 61000-4系列的等同替代，須單獨為沙特市場取得涵蓋抗擾度的SALEEM符合性證書。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17626 series — Electromagnetic compatibility — Testing and measurement techniques (Chinese national adoption of IEC 61000-4 series)

gap.en: Chinese CCC immunity testing to GB/T 17626 is not accepted by SASO as satisfaction of SASO IEC 61000-4 immunity requirements. The SALEEM CoC must cover both emissions and immunity testing and be issued by an accredited conformity body for the Saudi market. The SALEEM conformity mark must appear on the product. Products imported without a valid SALEEM CoC are refused at customs. Chinese CCC certificates, GB/T 17626 test reports, and Chinese conformity marks do not substitute for SALEEM CoC and markings.
gap.zh: 依据GB/T 17626的中国CCC抗扰度测试不被SASO接受为满足SASO IEC 61000-4抗扰度要求的替代。SALEEM符合性证书须涵盖骚扰发射和抗扰度测试，并由认可的合格评定机构为沙特市场签发。SALEEM合格标志须标注于产品上。无有效SALEEM CoC的进口产品将在海关被拒绝。中国CCC证书、GB/T 17626检测报告和中国合格标志不能替代SALEEM符合性证书和标志。
gap.zht: 依據GB/T 17626的中國CCC抗擾度測試不被SASO接受為滿足SASO IEC 61000-4抗擾度要求的替代。SALEEM符合性證書須涵蓋騷擾發射和抗擾度測試，並由認可的合格評定機構為沙特市場簽發。SALEEM合格標誌須標注於產品上。無有效SALEEM CoC的進口產品將在海關被拒絕。中國CCC證書、GB/T 17626檢測報告和中國合格標誌不能替代SALEEM符合性證書和標誌。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SASO IEC 61000-4 immunity conformity and SALEEM CoC required; SALEEM mark must be affixed to product before sale or import in Saudi Arabia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for CCC-scope products — GB/T 17626 immunity testing included in CCC process; voluntary for non-CCC products

source.publisher: Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO) — SALEEM Program

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SASO IEC 61000-4 immunity conformity, covered by the SALEEM Certificate of Conformity with the SALEEM mark on the product, is mandatory for wireless/IoT devices imported into Saudi Arabia. Chinese CCC immunity testing to GB/T 17626 does not satisfy this requirement. A full SALEEM CoC covering both emissions (SASO IEC/CISPR 32) and immunity (SASO IEC 61000-4 series) must be obtained from an accredited conformity body before Saudi customs clearance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SASO IEC 61000-4抗扰度合规（通过SALEEM符合性证书涵盖，并在产品上贴附SALEEM标志）是进口至沙特阿拉伯的无线/物联网设备的强制要求。依据GB/T 17626的中国CCC抗扰度测试不满足此要求。须在沙特海关清关前从认可合格评定机构取得涵盖骚扰发射（SASO IEC/CISPR 32）和抗扰度（SASO IEC 61000-4系列）的完整SALEEM符合性证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SASO IEC 61000-4抗擾度合規（通過SALEEM符合性證書涵蓋，並在產品上貼附SALEEM標誌）是進口至沙特阿拉伯的無線/物聯網設備的強制要求。依據GB/T 17626的中國CCC抗擾度測試不滿足此要求。須在沙特海關清關前從認可合格評定機構取得涵蓋騷擾發射（SASO IEC/CISPR 32）和抗擾度（SASO IEC 61000-4系列）的完整SALEEM符合性證書。
